summary: Low-Level Design document created for FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import). The LLD specifies client-side API, data models, component architecture, sequence diagrams, error handling, and security considerations. PR #22 opened as draft for design review.

artifacts.name: Low-Level Design for FR-SHARE-001
artifacts.description: LLD document with API specs, data models, component architecture, sequence diagrams, error handling, and security considerations

human_review_required.reason: Design must be approved before implementation begins

recommended_actions: Review LLD for completeness and alignment with PRD and technical architecture
Verify that all acceptance criteria are addressed
Check that security considerations (XSS prevention, no external transmission) are adequately covered
Confirm that test IDs and acceptance criteria match implementation plan
